title: The Basement Beneath the Basement

features.name: archive-listening-dark
features.desc-on-touch: the archive has no eyes here, but it hears—every sound you make becomes data, every footstep is filed, every breath is catalogued in a system you cannot see or understand

features.name: storage-rows
features.desc-on-touch: row after row of identical storage units extend into the darkness—each holds something precious, though no one here remembers what was stored, only the fact of the storing itself

features.name: pressure-building
features.desc-on-touch: the weight of everything stored above presses down into silence—the archive does not remember what it holds, but the holding itself has become its own meaning, its own endless reason

features.name: void-of-purpose
features.desc-on-touch: you stand in a space where archiving continues without memory, where storage has become pure function divorced from knowing—the darkness is full of the act of keeping with no purpose left to keep for

inscription: the archive's memory ended here; what remains is only the archive itself, keeping what it no longer understands

file.name: Archive_Basement_Depth_Log.tmp
file.note: ERROR: archive has exceeded witness — storage continues but the purpose of the storing cannot be recovered; the archive maintains itself as pure archive

exits.label: back up to the station's archive depth
deeper to where the archive forgets even how to listen
toward a place where filing becomes faith
